title: CIOs: Slash Software Costs by Rebuilding with AI! ROI Matters! #shorts
summary: CIOs should scrutinize software spending and identify systems that AI can rebuild to achieve major cost savings and strategic advantage. The argument emphasizes calculating AI's ROI when optimizing tech investments for the future of work.
writeup: This short makes the case that CIOs should audit software spending and flag systems that AI could rebuild to cut costs and gain strategic advantage. The framing matters for tech budget decisions tied to the future of work, where replacing existing software with AI-built alternatives is positioned as a cost lever. The central takeaway: calculate AI's ROI before optimizing tech investments, treating rebuild candidates as a measured financial decision rather than a default.
